title: Protocol between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Kingdom of Norway, further amending the Convention for the Avoidance of Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to Taxes on Income and Capital ,signed at London on 22:01:1969, as amended by the Protocol signed at London on 23:06:1977 (See Notes Page)
subject: TAXATION
